description: Report-only hub empty-state contract. These rules do not modify public hub pages, CTAs, schedules, or Enrollware links.

current_classes.headline: Current classes available
current_classes.body: Show current Enrollware-backed class/session offers for this hub.

approved_seed_offers.headline: Additional class times available by review
approved_seed_offers.body: Show approved report-only seed offers as hub offers only. Do not create standalone class landers from these offers.

requestable.headline: Need this class for your group?
requestable.body: No current public class dates are modeled for this hub. Use a request path or contact workflow instead of showing fake dates.

call_to_schedule.headline: Available by request
call_to_schedule.body: This training option may be available by request. Contact 910CPR to review timing and requirements.

check_back_soon.headline: Check back soon
check_back_soon.body: No current public class dates are modeled for this hub yet.

suppress_hub_offer_block.headline: No public offer block recommended
suppress_hub_offer_block.body: Suppress the hub offer block until current Enrollware classes or approved seed offers exist.

needs_review.headline: Hub offer state needs review
needs_review.body: The report could not determine a safe empty-state contract for this hub.

arc.headline: Red Cross classes are available by request
arc.body: No current Red Cross class dates are modeled for this hub. Use a professional contact or group-training path instead of showing placeholder dates.

hsi.headline: HSI classes are available by request
hsi.body: No current HSI class dates are modeled for this hub. Use a professional contact or group-training path instead of showing placeholder dates.
